column1: # /Worksheet Global Default Other International Punctuation A..H —
# selects the locale's decimal point, function-argument separator, and
# thousands-grouping character. Today's default is Punctuation A
# Seed a comma-formatted cell (A1) so the display reflects each
# /WGDOIP A — explicit US default. Display unchanged.
# /WGDOIP B — decimal `,`, argument `.`, thousands `.`. The comma cell
# /WGDOIP H — last variant in the table; thousands space, decimal `,`.
